data.title: Soccer Association of Columbia Joins All Access hosted by Andy Garcia to Discuss the Evolution of Youth Athletics
data.description: In a segment of "All Access hosted by Andy Garcia," set to air soon, the spotlight will be on the correlation between elite sports and community-centered growth. The featured organization will be the Soccer Association of Columbia in Maryland.

data.title: Hankook Proves Technical Excellence at WRC Croatia Rally 2026
data.description: The recent Croatia Rally wrapped up after featuring revamped coastal and mountain stages, providing a highly competitive environment with various uncertain factors. The car models Ventus Z215 and Z210 displayed reliable performance on diverse terrains, which helped in successfully finishing the rally. This event marked the conclusion of Round 5 of the 2026 WRC season, highlighting the challenging yet thrilling nature of the competition.

data.title: Narwal Launches Flow 2 Robot Vacuum with Vision Language Model(VLM) and Upgraded FlowWash Mopping System
data.description: Introducing the 2026 model from Narwal, a top player in smart home cleaning technology, offering limitless object recognition capabilities, a self-cleaning track mop system that can reach temperatures of up to 140°F, and a redesigned premium look for enhanced efficiency in household cleaning. This news was unveiled in New York on April 13, 2026 by Narwal.

data.title: FTI Consulting Appoints Benedict Brogan to Strategic Communications Segment
data.description: On April 13, 2026, FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed the hiring of Benedict Brogan, who will serve as a Senior Managing Director in the Strategic Communications division. FTI Consulting is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FCN.

data.title: West Red Lake Gold finds high-grade gold intersections in Austin 904 Complex, with 215.46 g/t Au over 5.35m, 50.34 g/t Au over 4.05m, and 61.70 g/t Au over 3m.
data.description: One hundred and twenty people were rescued by emergency services after a severe flooding incident in a small town in the Midwest. The flooding resulted from heavy rainfall that caused a nearby river to overflow its banks, forcing residents to flee their homes. In total, 50 homes were damaged, with estimated repair costs reaching $500,000. Fortunately, there were no reported casualties in the incident. The National Weather Service issued a warning about potential flash floods in the region and advised residents to take precautions. The town mayor praised the quick response of emergency services and the unity of the community in dealing with the crisis. The local government has allocated funds for recovery efforts and has urged residents to stay vigilant as more rain is forecasted in the coming days.

data.title: Precision Garage Door Ranked #1 in Customer Lead Handling Effectiveness™ Home Services Study
data.description: In a recent study conducted in Austin, Texas, Precision Garage Door Service has been identified as the top performer in the Home Services Lead Handling Effectiveness™ Study. This study evaluated the effectiveness of interacting with and following up on new customers within the home services industry. Precision Garage Door Service secured the number one position in this ranking, showcasing their exceptional lead handling practices. This recognition highlights their superior customer engagement strategies, setting them apart from competitors in the industry.

data.title: Hexagon to acquire Waygate Technologies, expanding into non-destructive testing
data.description: The recent acquisition has positioned Hexagon as a top global supplier of non-destructive testing (NDT) solutions, expanding precision measurement capabilities to encompass both surface and internal component analysis. This move has significantly widened Hexagon's influence from the manufacturing floor to encompass maintenance, repair, and operations as well. This strategic maneuver solidifies Hexagon's position in the industry, offering a comprehensive range of NDT solutions to a wider customer base.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic – Transactions in Connection with Share Buy-Back Program
data.description: Bavarian Nordic A/S has disclosed updates on their share buy-back initiative, initiated on March 12, 2026. The company, listed as OMX: BAVA, plans to repurchase shares totaling up to DKK 200 million between March 12, 2026, and May 13, 2026. This buy-back program is conducted in compliance with the Safe Harbour Regulation, encompassing Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052.
